nasb.text: But Barzillai said to the king, “How long have I yet to live, that I should go up with the king to Jerusalem?

esv.text: But Barzillai said to the king, “How many years have I still to live, that I should go up with the king to Jerusalem?

cnv.text: 巴西萊對王說：“我活著的年日還能有多少，可使我與王一同上耶路撒冷呢？

ccb.text: 巴西莱说：“我何必跟王一同去耶路撒冷呢？我还能活多久呢？
